text: The image shows a large elephant with several visible injuries on its body, including cuts and bruises. The elephant appears to be in a state of distress, as it is lying down on the ground with its head down. The elephant's injuries are not only on its body but also on its legs, which are clearly visible. The elephant is standing in a dirt area, and there are people nearby, possibly observing the situation.

The image shows a lion lying on its side in the grass. The lion appears to be injured, with a large wound on its head and a pink mark on its face. The lion's posture suggests it may be unable to stand or move.
